form.label: Sign off History
form.description: Historical sign-off records for Compliance Review.

search.query: index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | stats count by device | fields device

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | stats count by department | fields department

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | stats count by group | fields group

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") AND (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | stats count by hostname | fields hostname
index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | stats count by reviewed_by | fields reviewed_by

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff"
| where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | where (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | where (group="$filter_group$" OR "$filter_group$"="*") | where (hostname="$filter_host$" OR "$filter_host$"="*") | where (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | where (reviewed_by="$filter_reviewer$" OR "$filter_reviewer$"="*")
| eval "Signed Off At" = strftime(_time,"%d %b %Y %H:%M:%S")
| table "Signed Off At" hostname device department group reviewed_by remarks
| rename hostname as "Host" device as "Device" department as "Department" group as "Group" reviewed_by as "Reviewed By" remarks as "Remarks"
| sort -"Signed Off At"
